mapper.sql: id, title, cover_image, content, start_time, end_time, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from ws_activity order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into ws_activity(title, cover_image, content, start_time, end_time, status) values (#{title}, #{coverImage}, #{content}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: update ws_activity set title = #{title}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, content = #{content}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
